title: Blind|PVP
description: A dark themed pack, providing a fresh spin on PvP with animations, particles and much more! (WIP)
body:
![Project title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XGxg0qHy/images/acde68dd120517ff746676fe3debd159b23c0511.png)

- - -

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>
Blind includes all of the pvp essentials like low shield, no explosion particles, low fire, etc.

It also has custom animated swords, tools and armor!

![Armor showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ECAf8L7k/images/0e54863f98830947a0a7e7ae64ac7ea7d9a18a02.png)

</details>

- - -

### Development
This resource pack is still in alpha, any feedback is greatly appreciated!

### Quality of Life
If you are experiencing textures getting stuck on weird frames make sure you have this setting turned **off** when using sodium! \
Options > Video Settings > Performance > 
![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XGxg0qHy/images/00ffd7fda195605aee1a2d194db9a6ea8fc0a55c_350.webp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/XGxg0qHy/images/00ffd7fda195605aee1a2d194db9a6ea8fc0a55c_350.webp)
